title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the pros and cons of these energy sources for the future, then decide which two should receive the most government funding.

script.text: Please talk together about the advantages and disadvantages of these different energy sources.
Now decide which two energy sources are the most vital for our future energy security.
